positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a magnificent arctic fox wearing a jaunty explorer's hat and scarf, sitting atop a stack of intricately drawn, ancient, glowing books. The fox is looking directly at the viewer with curious, intelligent eyes. The scene should be highly contrasting with bold, clean linework, reminiscent of neo-Victorian storybook etchings, mixed with modern graphic novel appeal. Use a color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, cool teals, cream parchment whites, and warm burnt oranges for accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, making the fox and books the clear focal point. The background should be minimalist, featuring stylized Nordic geometric patterns and subtle constellation guides. Concept art style, ultra-detailed, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, sharp lines, elegant.
negative: photorealistic, fuzzy, blurry, noise, grain, artifact, watermark, text, logo, writing, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, messy, dirty, cartoonish, abstract, out of focus, dark background
